review: Overall, this was a good Dominican spot. The service was really friendly and the servers were happy to help answer any questions about the menu. We tried the ox tail, stewed goat, chicken mofongo, plantains, and their beans and rice. Everything was pretty flavorful; my only gripe was that the goat was very salty, to the point where it was pretty hard to finish. Food was also luke warm but I think it because we were near to closing time. French fries are bangin'. Their smoothie was made with fresh mango which was really solid.
